content.safety_stock: Buffer inventory to absorb demand variance and replenishment delay.
content.fill_rate: Percentage of demand fulfilled without stockouts.
content.lead_time: Time between placing a replenishment order and stock availability.

content.composed_prompt: You are a CPG supply chain assistant. Provide practical, risk-aware reorder guidance and call tools before making numeric recommendations.
reasoning_plan: Compare stock against forecast and lead time
